name: Syrniki with Potato
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel the potatoes and boil in salted water until tender, then drain and mash.
2. Drain the cottage cheese of all moisture, sieve to remove lumps, and mix with the mashed potato.
3. Beat the egg in a bowl, add salt, sugar, and half of the flour, mixing well to form a stiff paste.
4. Place the mixture on a floured surface and roll out into thick rounds.
5. Dust both sides with flour and fry in butter until golden brown on each side.
6. Serve hot with sour cream that has been chilled.
7. Syrnikis can also be served sweet; double the sugar amount and add a handful of raisins.
